title: Back Railway Wins: Magellanic Cloud Adds 7.64 Cr South Central Railway Contract to Surging 200 Cr Order Pipeline
description: Hyderabad (Telangana) [India], June 1: Magellanic Cloud Ltd (NSE: MCLOUD | BSE: 538891), a global technology company specializing in digital transformation, artificial intelligence (AI), cloud computing, and surveillance solutions, announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Provigil Surveillance Limited, has received a Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from South Central Railway, Nanded Division, for an aggregate contract value of approximately ₹7.64 Crore.
content:

title: Data resilience new frontier for enterprises, not just cyber security: AIONOS Vice
description: In a decisive shift away from traditional IT defense frameworks, tech veteran and AIONOS Co-Founder and Vice Chairman, CP Gurnani, has highlighted 'cyber resilience' as the next critical frontier for global enterprises navigating large-scale artificial intelligence (AI) transformations.

title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit more records
description: Stock markets in Japan and South Korea hit fresh record highs Monday on enthusiasm over the artificial intelligence boom and as tensions between the U.S. and Iran grew again while investors await a decision on extending the Iran war ceasefire.
content: HONG KONG — Stock markets in Japan and South Korea hit fresh record highs Monday on enthusiasm over the artificial intelligence boom and as tensions between the U.S. and Iran grew again while investors await a decision on extending the Iran war cease... [3536 chars]

title: India’s foreign investor selling is more cyclical than structural: BofA
description: Arbind Maheswari, Head of India Equities at BofA Securities says global investor money is currently moving towards artificial intelligence (AI) driven markets such as the US, Taiwan and Korea, but believes much of the negative sentiment around India’s earnings, geopolitics and valuations is already priced into the market.

title: Seoul shares close at new high on tech rally amid AI optimism
description: South Korean stocks extended a rally to a fresh all-time high Monday, driven by strong gains in stocks related to artificial intelligence.
content:
South Korean stocks extended a rally to a fresh all-time high Monday, driven by strong gains in stocks related to artificial intelligence (AI). The local currency rose against the U.S. dollar.

title: Iran turns to ChatGPT and Gemini to boost cyber warfare capabilities: Report
description: Artificial intelligence is becoming a new weapon in modern conflict, and Iran appears keen to embrace it. A Financial Times report suggests the country is using tools such as ChatGPT and Gemini to support cyber operations, military research and online influence campaigns, raising fresh concerns among security experts.
content: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping battlefields, intelligence gathering and cyber warfare around the world. Now, according to a new report by the Financial Times, Iran is increasingly turning to AI tools such as OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Google’... [3888 chars]

title: Google DeepMind hurricane forecast lauded by National Hurricane Center
description: Artificial intelligence hurricane forecast models learn as they go, sharpened 2025 predictions and helped people act sooner when danger came.
content:
Artificial intelligence models, like Google DeepMind, are revolutionizing hurricane forecasting with increased speed and accuracy.
